operative union steam laundry


be In operation in Tacoma with


a month. The trades council of


Il city unanimously voted in favor
Of the enterprise, owing to the hos
tile attitude assumed by the laundry
employers toward the Laundry Work
ers' union. which was organized three
weeks ago. The council appointed a
committee to lease u suitable building
and purchase all the necessary ma
chinery, SO that the plant may be
In operation before the close of the
month. -


1.-THE capital stock of the new COM
pany," says report from Tacoma,
sis to be $4,000, divided into shares
of 81 each. The entire stock should
be subscribed by the different unions
and by individual union men. The
union men claim to have 5000 persons
in their ranks who can be depended
upon to patronize the cooperative
laundry"


The union has now a membership
or 100 and 1t Is understood that the
new laundry will employ So hands.


The Russian government exercises
u paternal control over the mining
companies for the protection OF the
working people. employing a small
army of officials for that purpose. All
companies are obliged to supply .
government mining engineer and are
subject to periodical visits from gov
ernment inspectors. The companies
are obliged to provide proper accom-
modations for the operatives in the
way of homes, hospitals and churches.
and the slightest accident resulting
in injury to any workman Is the sub
5ect of government inquiry,


One Of the rules that will be insist
ed upon should tho new constitution
and bylaws Of the trades council be
adopted Is that a union must be in
existence at least four months before
1t can request the council to endorse
any demands 1t may make In the way
of raising the scale of wages or
shortening the hours of labor.
